pr.title: Phase 9: AI + Intelligent Features (DDD/TDD)
pr.body: ## Summary Phase 9 implements the AI + Intelligence layer for the CCC platform, adding 8 new aggregate roots and 41 new API endpoints following DDD + Clean Architecture + TDD. **Domain Layer (AI BC - 8 new aggregates):** - `DigitalEmployee` / `DigitalEmployeeScene` — AI bot with intent/FAQ matching and transfer-to-human triggers - `QARule` — 11 rule types: keyword, regex, silence, speed, interruption, energy, duration, entity, role, abnormal_hangup, LLM - `QAScheme` — Multi-rule weighted combination for quality inspection - `QAResult` — Inspection results with appeal/review workflow (completed → appealed → reviewed) - `ASRHotwords` — Custom speech recognition vocabulary management - `PerformanceScorecard` — Agent performance metrics (QA 30%, CSAT 30%, FCR 20%, Adherence 20%) **LLM Provider Interface (pluggable architecture):** - 13 operations: Summarize, AnalyzeSentiment, ExtractTags, PredictSatisfaction, AnalyzeIVRPath, JudgeCompletion, ExtractPostCallActions, AutoFillTicket, RecommendScript, QAInspectLLM + Phase 8 Correct/Expand/Optimize - ASR/TTS provider interfaces for Tongyi integration - StubProvider for development/testing **Application Layer:** - AI Analysis Service: summary, sentiment, tags, satisfaction prediction, IVR path analysis, completion score, post-call actions, auto-fill ticket, script recommendation, batch tag analysis, hotword analysis **Infrastructure:** - 7 MySQL repos (DigitalEmployee, Scene, QARule, QAScheme, QAResult, ASRHotwords, PerformanceScorecard) **41 new API endpoints:** - Digital Employees: POST/GET/GET{id}/PUT{id} + scenes CRUD + publish + test intent (8) - QA Rules: POST/GET/GET{id}/PUT{id}/DELETE{id} (5) - QA Schemes: POST/GET/GET{id}/PUT{id}/DELETE{id} (5) - QA Execution: POST /run, GET /results, GET /results/{id}, POST appeal, POST review (5) - AI Call Analysis: summary, sentiment, tags, satisfaction, IVR analysis, completion, post-actions, auto-fill, script-recommend (9) - Batch: session-tag-analysis, hotword-analysis (2) - ASR Hotwords: POST/GET/GET{id}/PUT{id}/DELETE{id} (5) - Performance: GET list, POST generate (2) **26 TDD tests (15 domain + 11 application):** - Digital Employee: create, intent match, transfer trigger, publish scene, invalid intents, no match - Quality Inspection: keyword/silence/speed/LLM rules, scheme score calculation, appeal/review flow, empty transcript, invalid rule type - ASR Hotwords: CRUD - Performance: generate with weighted score - AI Analysis: transcription, script recommend, auto-fill, session tags, satisfaction, sentiment, IVR analysis, completion, post-call actions, batch tags, hotwords ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] Verify keyword QA rule properly matches Chinese characters in transcripts (Unicode handling in `containsIgnoreCase`) - [ ] Verify QA appeal flow: only `completed` → `appealed` → `reviewed` transitions are allowed - [ ] Verify weighted scheme score calculation: rule1_score * weight1 + rule2_score * weight2 / total_weight - [ ] Verify LLM Provider interface is pluggable — StubProvider can be replaced with real Tongyi provider without code changes - [ ] Run `go test -race ./internal/domain/ai/... ./internal/application/aianalysis/...` to confirm all 26 new tests pass ### Notes - LLM operations use StubProvider (echoes/defaults) — replace with real Aliyun Tongyi provider in production - ASR/TTS provider interfaces defined but not yet connected to real services - Frontend tasks (9.24-9.29, 9.33) are deferred per plan - Total test count: 155 (129 existing + 26 new) Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/35e328fa681447e98fa82466c8f69b99 Requested by: @divord97 ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
